water.name: Cottonwood Creek and tributaries above Little Cottonwood Creek confluence (Horseshoe Meadow)

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(32) — Cottonwood Creek and all tributaries upstream from the confluence with Little Cottonwood Creek (Inyo Co.)
sources.quotedText: (32) Cottonwood Creek and all tributaries upstream from the confluence of the main stem Cottonwood Creek and Little Cottonwood Creek, including the unnamed tributaries flowing through Horseshoe Meadow (Inyo Co.). All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General provisions for the §7.50(b) special-regulation waters list
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Cottonwood Lakes Trail | Inyo National Forest | Forest Service
sources.quotedText: The Cottonwood Lakes are home to California's state fish, the Golden Trout (Oncorhynchus mykiss aguabonita).

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Landforms layer record for gaz_id 271655, "Horseshoe Meadow", Flat, Inyo Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":271655,"gaz_name":"Horseshoe Meadow","gaz_featureclass":"Flat","fcode":15028,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Inyo"} — geometry point (Web Mercator -13155253.6713, 4362018.5694) converts to lon -118.1756, lat 36.4449, the alpine meadow explicitly named in this water's title/alias ("Horseshoe Meadow") through which the regulated tributaries of upper Cottonwood Creek flow; independently corroborated by TopoZone/AnyPlaceAmerica listings of the same coordinate (36.444936, -118.175642) for GNIS ID 271655. The prior recorded coordinate (-118.1591, 36.4436) was about 1.5 km southeast and not tied to any GNIS feature (gnisId was null); Cottonwood Creek's own GNIS stream record (gaz_id 240982, spanning from the valley floor up to the Sierra crest) has no single point better suited to this reach-scoped entry than Horseshoe Meadow itself.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used (no bait)
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag; per CCR §7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit is also 2 trout.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
